TimeEntry.Title: Setup new 3cx PBX
TimeEntry.Notes:
Start working on the client 3cx issue and new setup and complete the following:

  • Inbound rules and digital receptionist configured and tested — inbound calls working as expected.

  • Outbound calls failing on both Broadvoice SIP trunk and our Technijian Test SIP trunk (which works on other PBXs).

  • Broadvoice is not an officially certified 3CX provider; may contribute to compatibility issues.

  • Troubleshooting completed: reviewed SIP trunk settings, checked dial plans, validated registration, verified blacklist/allowlist IPs, and confirmed routing rules.

  • Issue appears to be related to the 3CX Cloud/PBX side due to consistent failure across multiple trunks.

  • Requested 3CX portal credentials from the client to open a support case with 3CX for further investigation.
